summary: Taiki has shifted his stance from bearish to bullish in his most recent video, explicitly claiming that the market bottom is in.
narrative: After spending months shorting ETH for significant profits, his latest analysis suggests the correction has concluded. He argues that the market is bottoming and identifies potential catalysts, such as STRC, that could drive Bitcoin to higher prices, contradicting the bearish 4-Year Cycle narrative.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
